metadata.change_reason: Represent the Human-pasteable Cursor start command as machine-readable policy.

purpose: Start authority resolution and preflight, not task execution.
human_paste_lines: Identify the exact Human Decision ID and one Task ID.
Open the fixed CURRENT Boot and load the ordered authority sources in cursor_boot_manifest.json.
Suppress conflicting legacy rules and report what was suppressed and why.
Read and validate the machine-readable Task Envelope.
Validate identity, lease, one-task limit, scope, dependencies, base SHA, isolated worktree and untouched Human Main.
Print the complete CURSOR PREFLIGHT report before any file modification.
Work only on the authorized task and never touch protected paths or Human Main.
Never merge or push main, deploy, use secrets or invent a Source of Truth.
Run required tests and the pre-handoff protected-path check.
Produce HANDOFF.md and handoff.json, then wait for Codex Review and required Human Approval.
On any conflict, stop and output BLOCKED_REASON, EVIDENCE and RECOMMENDED_HUMAN_DECISION.
